finishes.special_notes: Ceilings: 5/8" type X GWB on 1/2" RC at 12" o.c., 1-hour rated; finish paint. Fire-rated listed UL assemblies referenced for ceilings. All wallboard partitions receiving accessories (rails, panels, casework, etc.) to be provided with solid fire-retardant-treated (FRT) blocking/reinforcement.

general_notes.fire_blocking: Fire-retardant blocking required at all wallboard partitions receiving accessories (grab bars, casework, electrical panels, etc.); 3/4" FRT plywood behind electrical panels.
general_notes.special_blocking: Wood blocking required for future grab bars at water closets/showers (per accessible design); blocking called for kitchen counters, wall accessories, and TV/backboards.
general_notes.other_notes: Refer to appliance schedule for basis-of-design. All dimensions to face of stud unless otherwise noted. Field verify blocking heights. Provide sealant at all locations where GWB wall types interface with unfinished CMU.
